a.xlink:title: Gets or creates a root audio unit for the specified token.
Adds an audio buffer to a token and channel.
Adds a processor to all channels in an audio token.
Ensures a root audio unit exists for a specific token and channel.
Ensures an audio unit exists and resizes it to the specified channel count.
Gets the processing chain for an audio token and channel.
Gets the root audio buffer for a specific token and channel.
Resizes all buffers in an audio unit to the specified size.
Adds a buffer to a token (dispatches based on token type)
Clones an audio buffer for each channel in the specified list.
Adds a processor to all channels in a token (dispatches based on token)
Ensures minimum number of audio channels exist for a token.
Connects a node to a specific audio token and channel.
Adds a processor to a specific audio token and channel.
Adds a processor to a token (dispatches based on token)
Creates and attaches a quick processing function to an audio token/channel.
Gets mutable reference to audio buffer data for a channel.
Gets const reference to audio buffer data for a channel.
Resizes all audio buffers for a token to the specified size.
